notes: I've designed an Apple-inspired OS preview for your AI assistant. It features a soft frosted device frame in the hero, stacked feature bands with subtle depth, and a 'Before/After' comparison strip to show the shift from clutter to clarity. The monochrome palette and wide layouts give it that calm, keynote-style product reveal feeling.
prompt: Design an Apple-inspired OS preview page for an AI assistant. Use soft frosted device frames, stacked feature bands, one comparison strip, and calm monochrome depth. The page should feel like a keynote product reveal, not a SaaS dashboard.
suggestions: Experiment with a warmer color palette
title: OS Preview: A New Quiet
